Question_enfile: A mother brings her 3-week-old infant to the pediatrician's office because she is concerned about his feeding habits. He was born without complications and has not had any medical problems up until this time. However, for the past 4 days, he has been fussy, is regurgitating all of his feeds, and his vomit is yellow in color. On physical exam, the child's abdomen is minimally distended but no other abnormalities are appreciated. Which of the following embryologic errors could account for this presentation?
Options_enfile: {'A': 'Abnormal migration of ventral pancreatic bud', 'B': 'Complete failure of proximal duodenum to recanalize', 'C': 'Abnormal hypertrophy of the pylorus', 'D': 'Failure of lateral body folds to move ventrally and fuse in the midline'}
Question_zhfile: 一位母亲带着她3周大的婴儿来到儿科诊所，因为她担心孩子的喂养习惯。婴儿出生时无并发症，此前未出现任何健康问题。然而，过去4天里，婴儿一直烦躁不安，每次喂食后都会反流，且呕吐物呈黄色。体格检查显示，患儿腹部轻微膨隆，但未发现其他异常。以下哪种胚胎发育异常可能导致这一临床表现？
Options_zhfile: {'A': '腹侧胰芽异常迁移', 'B': '近端十二指肠完全再通失败', 'C': '幽门异常肥大', 'D': '外侧体褶未能向腹侧移动并在中线融合'}

Question_enfile: A 5-week-old infant born at 36 weeks' gestation is brought to the physician for a well-child examination. Her mother reports that she previously breastfed her for 15 minutes every 2 hours but now feeds her for 40 minutes every 4 hours. The infant has six wet diapers and two stools daily. She currently weighs 3500 g (7.7 lb) and is 52 cm (20.4 in) in length. Vital signs are with normal limits. Cardiopulmonary examination shows a grade 4/6 continuous murmur heard best at the left infraclavicular area. After confirming the diagnosis via echocardiography, which of the following is the most appropriate next step in management of this patient?
Question_zhfile: 一名孕36周出生、现5周大的婴儿被带至医生处进行健康检查。其母亲表示，之前每2小时母乳喂养15分钟，现在改为每4小时喂养40分钟。婴儿每日有6次湿尿布和2次排便。目前体重3500克（7.7磅），身长52厘米（20.4英寸）。生命体征均在正常范围内。心肺检查显示在左锁骨下区闻及4/6级连续性杂音。经超声心动图确诊后，下列哪项是该患者最合适的下一步处理措施？
Options_zhfile: {'A': '前列腺素E1输注', 'B': '吲哚美辛输注', 'C': '手术结扎', 'D': '经皮手术'}

Question_enfile:
A 53-year-old woman with hypertension and hyperlipidemia comes to the physician because of generalized reddening of her skin and itching for the past 2 weeks. Her symptoms occur every evening before bedtime and last for about 30 minutes. Three months ago, atorvastatin was stopped after she experienced progressively worsening neck and back pain. Statin therapy was reinitiated at lower doses 3 weeks ago but had to be stopped again after her musculoskeletal symptoms recurred. Her menses occur irregularly at 2–3 month intervals and last for 3–4 days. She has smoked one pack of cigarettes daily for the past 30 years. Her current medications include lisinopril and niacin. Her brother died of colonic adenocarcinoma, and her father died of small cell lung cancer. She is 169 cm (5 ft 6 in) tall and weighs 83 kg (183 lb); BMI is 29 kg/m2. Her vital signs are within normal limits. Physical examination shows no abnormalities. Serum lipid studies show:
Total cholesterol 247 mg/dL
HDL-cholesterol 39 mg/dL
LDL-cholesterol 172 mg/dL
Triglycerides 152 mg/dL
Which of the following is the most appropriate next step in management?"
Options_enfile: {'A': 'Administer ibuprofen', 'B': 'Measure urine hydroxyindoleacetic acid levels', 'C': 'Measure urine metanephrine levels', 'D': 'Switch niacin to fenofibrate'}
Question_zhfile:
一名53岁女性，因高血压和高脂血症就诊，主诉近2周出现全身皮肤发红伴瘙痒。症状每晚睡前发作，持续约30分钟。3个月前，患者因颈部和背部疼痛逐渐加重而停用阿托伐他汀。3周前以小剂量重新开始他汀类药物治疗，但因肌肉骨骼症状复发而再次停药。患者月经不规律，每2-3个月来潮一次，持续3-4天。吸烟史30年，每日1包。当前用药包括赖诺普利和烟酸。其兄弟死于结肠腺癌，父亲死于小细胞肺癌。身高169厘米（5英尺6英寸），体重83公斤（183磅），体重指数为29 kg/m²。生命体征正常。体格检查未见异常。血脂检查结果如下：
总胆固醇 247 mg/dL
高密度脂蛋白胆固醇 39 mg/dL
低密度脂蛋白胆固醇 172 mg/dL
甘油三酯 152 mg/dL
以下哪项是下一步最合适的处理措施？
Options_zhfile: {'A': '给予布洛芬', 'B': '检测尿中羟基吲哚乙酸水平', 'C': '检测尿液中甲氧基肾上腺素水平', 'D': '将烟酸更换为非诺贝特'}

Question_enfile: A 70-year-old man comes to the physician because of a 4-month history of epigastric pain, nausea, and weakness. He has smoked one pack of cigarettes daily for 50 years and drinks one alcoholic beverage daily. He appears emaciated. He is 175 cm (5 ft 9 in) tall and weighs 47 kg (103 lb); BMI is 15 kg/m2. He is diagnosed with gastric cancer. Which of the following cytokines is the most likely direct cause of this patient’s examination findings?
Question_zhfile: 一名70岁男性因上腹部疼痛、恶心及乏力4个月就诊。患者有50年吸烟史，每日一包，每日饮用一份酒精饮料。患者呈恶病质状态。身高175厘米（5英尺9英寸），体重47公斤（103磅），体重指数为15 kg/m²。诊断为胃癌。以下哪种细胞因子最可能是导致该患者检查结果的直接原因？
Options_zhfile: {'A': '转化生长因子-β', 'B': '白细胞介素-6', 'C': '白细胞介素-2', 'D': '肿瘤坏死因子-β'}
